name: academic-research-loop
description: Autonomous academic research pipeline — discovers papers, analyzes with full-text, synthesizes themes, and writes complete survey papers with citations. Powered by a team of 14 AI research agents with mandatory group meetings.

plugins.name: academic-research-loop
plugins.description: Autonomous academic research pipeline with 7-phase pipeline, 14 specialized agents, quality gates, fact-checking, and inter-agent communication. Give it a topic, walk away, come back to a complete literature survey.
